name: Report summary works for an org with no findings
statusMessage:
XFAIL /reports/summary returns 500 "division by zero" for org with no findings (see issue #4)

AssertionError: assert 500 == <HTTPStatus.OK: 200>
 +  where 500 = <Response [500 Internal Server Error]>.status_code
 +  and   <HTTPStatus.OK: 200> = HTTPStatus.OK
